name: Yong Chae Kim
title: Ph.D. Candidate
bio: I am conducting research on applying deep learning to solve industrial challenges in mechanical systems (e.g., rotating machinery, motors, batteries). My research areas include fault diagnosis, signal generation, and denoising using domain adaptation, diffusion models, generative models, and physics-informed neural networks.
personalNote: I am from South Korea. I am passionate about exploring new places through travel, finding fulfillment in meaningful work, and building strong connections with people.

education.dissertation: Domain Knowledge Embedded Artificial Intelligence Based Data Drift Management (Expected)

education.thesis: Fault Detection of Rolling Bearing based on Machine Learning

experience.description: Advisory on IPO Technology Development Strategy
